cards.name: Sample/donor-level composition comparison
cards.description: Quantify condition-associated composition at the independent sample or donor level; use an embedding only as contextual overview.

supports_claims: Shows composition estimates across independent samples and can support a declared sample-level comparison.
does_not_support: Cell-level counts are not independent replicates; visual UMAP density alone does not establish abundance change or treatment causality.
required_statistics: sample-level uncertainty or a composition-aware model when inference is claimed

cards.name: Paired subject change plot
cards.description: Preserve subject pairing with connected observations or within-subject change estimates.

supports_claims: Shows within-subject direction and magnitude of change.
does_not_support: Does not justify an independent-sample test or causal attribution without the study design.
required_statistics: paired estimand and uncertainty when inference is claimed
preferred_companions: paired effect estimate with confidence interval

cards.name: Precision-recall evaluation
cards.description: Prefer a precision-recall curve when the positive class is rare; retain ROC as a complementary discrimination view.

supports_claims: Shows the precision-recall tradeoff in the supplied evaluation cohort.
does_not_support: Does not establish calibration, decision utility, external validity, or causality.

cards.name: Calibration assessment
cards.description: Compare predicted risks with observed outcomes and report uncertainty rather than equating discrimination with clinical usefulness.

supports_claims: Assesses agreement between predicted and observed risk in the evaluation data.
does_not_support: Does not alone establish net clinical benefit or external transportability.

cards.name: Filtered communication dot plot
cards.description: Use a traceably filtered dot plot or heatmap when a communication chord diagram is too dense.

supports_claims: Shows the retained computationally inferred communication scores under a declared filter.
does_not_support: Does not prove physical communication, molecular flux, or causality; weak edges cannot be removed silently.

cards.name: Evidence-tiered visual review
cards.description: Inspect pixels, metadata, code, and data only at the evidence level actually available; return keep, revise, or reselect.

supports_claims: Reports visible phenomena and traceable encoding interpretations at the declared evidence level.
does_not_support: Pixels-only review cannot invent p-values, sample size, normalization, thresholds, or causal conclusions.
required_statistics: none for pixels_only; source data required for numerical confirmation

cards.name: Figure-intent clarification
cards.description: Do not choose a chart from style words alone; first establish the question, analysis unit, data topology, evidence role, and output context.

supports_claims: Identifies the minimum information needed for a defensible figure choice.
does_not_support: Aesthetic imitation cannot substitute for a scientific question or compatible data.

cards.name: Plot-input data audit
cards.description: Check analysis unit, variables, repeats, transformations, missingness, and statistical prerequisites before selecting executable code.

supports_claims: Determines whether the available inputs can satisfy a plot and inference contract.
does_not_support: Does not replace assay-specific QC or statistical analysis.

cards.name: Evidence-matched visual examples
cards.description: Browse scientifically compatible examples only after the intent and data contract are minimally resolved.

supports_claims: Supports visual comparison among already compatible figure families.
does_not_support: A visually similar example is not automatically compatible with the user's data or claim.
